== Notes for [[Item:Q111987|Q111987]] ==

Oneca Sánchez de Navarra1

b. circa 905

Father Sancho I Garcés, rey de Pamplona1 b. circa 881?, d. 11 October 925

Mother Urraca Aznárez de Aragón1 b. circa 880

Charts Descendants of Charlemage

Oneca Sánchez de Navarra was born circa 905. She was the daughter of Sancho I Garcés, rey de Pamplona and Urraca Aznárez de Aragón.1 Oneca Sánchez de Navarra married rey de León Alfonso IV Ordoñez "el Monje", son of Ordoño II, rey de León and Munia Elvira Menéndez, in 923.1

Family

rey de León Alfonso IV Ordoñez "el Monje" b. after 911, d. circa 933

Child

rey de León Ordoño IV Alfonsez "el Malo" b. c 926, d. 9621

Citations

[S187] Royal Genealogy Database, online http://www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/public/genealogy/

Sancho I of Pamplona

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

The Codex of Roda gives Sancho and Toda six children:

Oneca (d.931), married Alfonso IV the Monk of León in 926

Infanta de Navarra
Reina de León (926-931)

Infanta de Navarra
Reina de León (926-931)

Source: Codex of Roda

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
